finding_results.evidence: Post-revision counts: (1) 'the way' as comparison connector: 4 instances — chapters/chapter_09.md:55 ('the way you'd say'), :79 ('the way you'd scan'), :109 ('the way his father had taught him'), :137 ('the way she always said it'). (2) 'He/he thought about' as interiority marker: 2 instances — chapters/chapter_09.md:23 ('he thought about this for a while'), :97 ('He thought about Mira'); no paragraph contains more than one. (3) 'the specific/particular' as modifier: 3 instances — chapters/chapter_09.md:31 ('the specific shade of gray'), :81 ('the particular gravity'), :129 ('the specific facial expression'). (4) 'the kind of': 2 instances — chapters/chapter_09.md:15 ('the kind of New Jersey'), :131 ('the kind of light'). (5) 'not X exactly / not X but Y' hedging: 3 instances — chapters/chapter_09.md:3 ('not new-car smell but its synthetic descendant'), :13 ('Not nostalgia exactly'), :27 ('not louder, but more textured'). All five sub-targets meet or exceed acceptance thresholds.
finding_results.notes: 18 edits across the chapter. Densest clusters addressed per rewrite direction: line 97's three-instance 'thought about' cluster reduced to 1 (two replaced with enactive constructions — persistent visual image and direct fragment); line 135's closing litany converted from reported thought to sentence-fragment images arriving in Dan's consciousness; consecutive 'the way' on lines 55/63 resolved by rephrasing line 63; consecutive 'not X exactly' near lines 21/27 resolved by cutting line 21's instance. Replacement constructions vary syntactically: participial phrases, bare fragments, em-dash parentheticals, direct interiority, and restructured comparisons. No sanitization, no dialogue register changes, no continuity alterations. Heading contract preserved. Character voice and sensory detail maintained throughout.

summary: Single finding CH09-PROSE-01 (five prose-formula tics) fully resolved. All five tic categories brought within acceptance thresholds: 'the way' 10→4, 'thought about' ~10→2, 'the specific/particular' 6→3, 'the kind of' 4→2, 'not X exactly/but Y' ~8→3. Edits targeted mechanical formula instances while preserving deliberately placed ones. Replacement constructions prioritize enactive interiority (images arriving in consciousness rather than reported thinking) and varied syntactic containers (fragments, participials, direct statements). The chapter's dread engine, sensory specificity, and accumulating moral pressure are undiminished. No collateral changes to continuity, dialogue register, or tonal register.
